title: Case 13 Wired Liar
overview: In the world of spies, Ange works in the shadows but is suddenly moved when Eric makes a heartbreaking plea. Will Ange believe him?

title: Case 1 Dancy Conspiracy
overview: Ange has just transferred into Queen's Mayfaire Academy, and she's on a mission to recruit the Princess. The only thing standing in her way is the Princess' agenda.

title: Case 2 Vice Voice
overview: The connection between Ange and the princess comes to light, and the girls discover Beatrice's extraordinary talents.

title: Case 9 Roaming Pigeons
overview: The girls are sent to retrieve a certain prototype from the Kingdom. In the meantime, Dorothy must keep a close eye on a friend.

title: Case 7 Bullet & Blade's Ballad
overview: The Princess must host Lord Horikawa during his time in the Kingdom of Albion. Only to be met with assassination attempts directed towards them both!

title: Case 16 Loudly Laundry
overview: The girls have their next assignment, and they must infiltrate a laundry mill to find a deadly weapon. In the mill, they catch a glimpse of the workers' conditions.

title: Case 18 Rouge Morgue
overview: Dorothy must take a case that involves her father, to retrieve a something from a dead body at his morgue. Does this bring them back closer together?

title: Case 11 Pell-mell Duel
overview: Chise writes to her sister about her life in the Kingdom of Albion, and how she struggles to adapt to their customs but the girls try their best to make Chise feel at home.

title: Case 20 Ripper Dipper
overview: As Ange is painting, she is reminded of the first time she met the princess. With fiction and reality clashing, Ange questions herself.

title: Case 22 Comfort Comrade
overview: Control gives Ange and Dorothy a new assignment along with an old acquaintance. Unfortunately, old memories arise that can't be swept away.

title: Case 23 Humble Double
overview: Ange must now fulfill her newest orders: assassinate the princess. With outside forces starting to make their move, what will happen to the Princess and Ange?

title: Case 24 Fall of the Wall
overview: With time against her, Ange will stop at nothing until she has the princess next to her. Will she be too late to save her?
